parameters.command: =cd {{ $env.EMPIRE_REPO_PATH }} && git add {{ $('Validate + route').item.json.file }} && git commit -m "capture: {{ $('Validate + route').item.json.type }} via console" --no-verify && git push origin main

nodes.name: Git commit + push
nodes.notes: Optional: commit + push to keep ops/ in sync. Disable if you prefer to drain manually. Requires git credentials configured on the n8n host.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, id: $('Validate + route').item.json.entry.id, file: $('Validate + route').item.json.file } }}
